subject: Fix appc failing to deploy with helm 2.7.2
commit_message:
Fix appc failing to deploy with helm 2.7.2

Change-Id: I89b90f5da3e9ee9da545b21cc01b4ac392318a21
Issue-ID: OOM-1033
Signed-off-by: BorislavG <Borislav.Glozman@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

root@borislav-oom-rancher:~/onap/master/oom/kubernetes# helm version
Client: &version.Version{SemVer:"v2.7.1", GitCommit:"4aef7fddc8335e0b7b00d9168c04955d903fdbee", GitTreeState:"clean"}
Server: &version.Version{SemVer:"v2.7.1", GitCommit:"4aef7fddc8335e0b7b00d9168c04955d903fdbee", GitTreeState:"clean"}
root@borislav-oom-rancher:~/onap/master/oom/kubernetes# kgpa | grep appc
onap          aaa-appc-0                                  2/2       Running   0          7m
onap          aaa-appc-1                                  2/2       Running   0          7m
onap          aaa-appc-2                                  2/2       Running   0          7m
onap          aaa-appc-cdt-54df796868-gbj6n               1/1       Running   0          7m
onap          aaa-appc-db-0                               2/2       Running   0          7m
onap          aaa-appc-dgbuilder-856445d5d-wf4wk          1/1       Running   0          7m
Change has been successfully merged by Mandeep Khinda

Patch Set 1:

I am still getting the same error with latest code with helm 2.7.2

Patch Set 1:

> I am still getting the same error with latest code with helm 2.7.2

Please make sure you did "make all", otherwise you may have old chart in helm repo.

Patch Set 1:

I was installing aai as consul is dependent on it in some aspects .. 

I have done make all and ran only aai and getting the below error.
